title: Mouse Traps, Sticky Mousetraps Pads, Strong Sticky Mouse Trap Indoors/outdoor, Mouse Stickypads for Indoors/outdoor
features: High adhesive strength: Our heavy-duty sticky mouse traps are made of special glue with strong adhesive strength. The harder the mouse struggles, the tighter it adheres. Unlike traditional sticky mouse traps that may not work well in humid areas/seasons, our sticky mouse traps are effective throughout the year

Can be cut to size: The strong sticky mouse trap is more suitable for catching larger and stronger , such as rats and snakes. This indoor mouse trap can be trimmed to the appropriate size as needed, making it convenient to place in narrow Spaces

Gentle and non-irritating: Our sticky mouse traps are made of materials and are gentle and non-irritating. They are healthier for your family, children and pets. This is a truly green and environmentally friendly product. The sticky mouse traps have an alluring fragrance. Just stick them on the places where mice frequently appear. After use, just wrap the mouse up and throw it away together. It's very convenient
Suitable for long-term use: The strong sticky mouse trap can effectively prevent the sticky mouse trap from slipping and tearing when struggling, and it will not break even after long-term use

Suitable for multiple animals: This large sticky mouse trap is suitable for all kinds of rodents both indoors and outdoors. It can be placed under the light as a bug trap to attract mosquitoes, flies and moths without any problem. Sticky mouse traps are also suitable for snakes, spiders, cockroaches and other rodents
